mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username as user_name FROM comment_message c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, u.username as user_name FROM comment_message c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.cm_id = #{cmId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_message (user_id, target_id, target_type, content, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_message WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType}
